title: Vanya Online - Idle MMORPG
description:
Vanya is a dark, free-to-play idle MMORPG set in a persistent online world where your character keeps growing through hunting, skill training, player economy, Bloodlines, global bosses, events, and PvP or Non-PvP worlds.

Create your character, choose your world, and begin a daily progression journey with no level cap, no skill cap, and no account resets.

 

A DARK IDLE MMORPG THAT NEVER RESETSVanya was built for players who enjoy constant progression. Hunt monsters, train your skills, collect gold, upgrade equipment, take part in the server economy, and watch your character grow day after day.

You do not need to stay glued to the screen all the time. Start your hunt, follow your progress, return to collect rewards, make decisions, and keep advancing.

TWO WORLDS, TWO WAYS TO PLAYDrakmor is the Non-PvP world, ideal for players who prefer a calmer experience focused on progression, economy, events, and daily growth.

Noctra is the PvP world, created for players who enjoy risk, rivalry, player attacks, and a more dangerous experience.

Choose how you want to live in Vanya.

TRAIN, HUNT, TRADE, AND GROWIn Vanya, every day matters. Train Sword, Bow, Magic, and Defense skills in the Pub or inside your House. Start Idle Hunts to earn EXP, Gold, and Loot. Use the Market, buy and sell items, strengthen your account, and climb the global rankings.

BLOODLINES, BOSSES, AND EVENTSJoin a Bloodline, help your group grow, donate resources, take part in collective systems, and prepare for special events. Vanya receives updates, limited-time events, new content, and expansions over time.

NO LEVEL CAP. NO SKILL CAP. NO ACCOUNT RESETS.Vanya Online is a persistent world. Your progress matters.

No level cap.
No skill cap.
No account resets.

Build your character at your own pace, play every day, or return whenever you want. The world remains alive, dark, and constantly expanding.
description_short: Vanya Online is a dark free-to-play idle MMORPG with endless progression, PvP and Non-PvP worlds, player economy, events, and no level cap, no skill cap, and no account resets.
